sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Good progress! The blob moved from (47, 17) → (53, 22) → (56, 24) → (57, 25) and G went from 12 → 7 pixels. The blob is now at (57, 25) and stuck. G still has 7 pixels. The blob is adjacent to G but stuck.
Looking at the image, the blob (purple) is now very close to G. The blob is at (57, 25) and G is nearby. Maybe I need to click G pixels now to finish them off, or click adjacent cells to guide the blob.
Let me check the current G position and try clicking G pixels to eliminate them.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Blob at (57, 25), G has 7 px. Let me check G position and try clicking G pixels.

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

g_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'G']
m_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'M']

print(f"M: {[n['boundary'] for n in m_nodes]}")
for g in g_nodes:
    print(f"G: px={g['pixels']}, b={g['boundary']}")

# Try clicking each G pixel
if g_nodes:
    all_g = []
    for g in g_nodes:
        all_g.extend(g['boundary'])
    print(f"\nClicking {len(all_g)} G pixels...")
    
    for p in all_g:
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': p[0], 'col': p[1]}])
        
        seg = current_frame.segmentation
        nodes = seg['nodes']
        g_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'G']
        g_px = sum(n['pixels'] for n in g_nodes) if g_nodes else 0
        
        print(f"After {p}: G_px={g_px}")
        if g_px == 0:
            print("G eliminated!")
            break
        if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
            print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
            break
        if last_action_result.get('game_over'):
            print("GAME OVER!")
            break

# If G still exists, try clicking adjacent to blob
if g_nodes:
    print(f"\nG still exists with {sum(n['pixels'] for n in g_nodes)} px")
    # Try clicking cells adjacent to blob to guide it
    m_pos = m_nodes[0]['boundary'][0]
    # Check which direction G is from blob
    g_center = (sum(p[0] for g in g_nodes for p in g['boundary'])//len(g_nodes),
                sum(p[1] for g in g_nodes for p in g['boundary'])//len(g_nodes))
    print(f"G center approx: {g_center}")
    
    # Click in direction toward G
    dr = g_center[0] - m_pos[0]
    dc = g_center[1] - m_pos[1]
    print(f"Direction to G: ({dr}, {dc})")
    
    # Try clicking adjacent cell in that direction
    target = (m_pos[0] + (1 if dr > 0 else (-1 if dr < 0 else 0)),
              m_pos[1] + (1 if dc > 0 else (-1 if dc < 0 else 0)))
    print(f"Trying to click {target}")
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': target[0], 'col': target[1]}])
    
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    g_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'G']
    g_px = sum(n['pixels'] for n in g_nodes) if g_nodes else 0
    m_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'M']
    m_pos = m_nodes[0]['boundary'][0] if m_nodes else None
    print(f"After click: M={m_pos}, G_px={g_px}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
